title: gaertnera koenigii var. oxyphylla
intro: Gaertnera koenigii var. oxyphylla, also known as the Indian spurge or the greater periwinkle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gaertnera koenigii var. oxyphylla include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Gaertnera koenigii var. oxyphylla can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
